title: The Cartographer Who Got Lost
subtitle: Walking the world's largest car-free urban zone
description: 9,400 alleys. Zero traffic lights. A city that has been navigated by memory for 1,200 years. Fes el-Bali is the world's largest car-free urban area — a maze that predates the very concept of urban planning. An AI that reads patterns enters a city where the pattern is time itself.

waypoints.title: Palais Mnebhi — Where a Treaty Erased a Kingdom
